text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has possessed immense talent from
the get-go, but this summer camp has proved to
be an immense boon.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Umm... Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for running with me. ♪ I had
a lot of fun thanks to your help.

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... You're kidding me... How are you not even out of breath?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can now easily go head-to-head with older
students. Her growth is beyond what I could have
imagined.
choice_data_list:
(And she's got the potential to get even
better!)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Are you okay, Trainer? Your eyes are
flashing.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...!
That voice...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Dammit! I'm not improving!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch, this isn't it. Then I'll try the next one...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I like the way Shakur looks when she's deep in
thought.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Though, most of the time, she notices me looking
at her right away and gets irritated!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Shall we get back to training? I have to work
hard too!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Ah, there she is! Lady Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And who might you be?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I'm just your average reporter! Your
accomplishments have made you the talk of the
town! You're the favorite to win the Shuka Sho by
a long shot!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm honored to hear it. Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hehe. Not only are you strong and beautiful,
but just watching you run is enough to lift my
spirits!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You're truly amazing! Would it be okay if I got a
picture?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, but interview requests must be
made through the academy.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! Is this your security? The two of you
together would make a great photo! Do you
mind?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's not fair! You got a head start! I want a
picture too!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
I'm from a local TV station! Would you be
interested in doing a live interview?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My, this is rather chaotic... I really might be the
favorite!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A crowd of onlookers is gathering quick. For Fine
Motion's sake, as well as all the other
Umamusume at camp, I'd like to request all of
them to leave...
choice_data_list: I'm going to be straight with them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's come to this...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Your Highness, please accompany
your trainer inside.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Right! Let's meet in an official setting next time,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ah! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When you suddenly mentioned "force," I thought
you might fight them off for a second.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I acted rashly, there's a good chance I would
have gotten us into even bigger trouble. Leaving
things to the professionals was the right choice.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
On the contrary, I thought very highly of your
judgment.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I have confidence in people who can maintain
their composure. I'd say you've charmed me all
over again. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Reporter D
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm going to miss my chance! Lady Fine, I'd
like a photo too!

text_block_list.name: Onlookers
text_block_list.text:
There sure are a lot of people over there.
You think it's some kind of celebrity?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm thinking up a plan, things become even
more boisterous than before. Without thinking, I
shout...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Now's our chance, Your Highness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell the crowd of reporters that this summer
camp is a vital time for Fine Motion and that she
can't take any interviews right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promise to provide an opportunity for them to
interview her after camp is over and ask them all
to leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a good half hour or so, but with the
assistance of Fine Motion's security team, we
clear everyone out.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You surprised me, shouting like that all of a
sudden. Did you have some kind of secret plan?
choice_data_list: I thought they'd understand if we talked it out.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see. You place rather high faith in people, then?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
That was very honorable of you, but please leave
everything to us in these types of situations. That
is precisely what we're here for.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
However, the way Trainer handled things must
have left a good impression on the reporters. I
think they'll be easier to deal with in the future.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And more than anything, you were pretty cool!
Great job!
